description: Arrest card in ICE's 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' template, in a near-square crop. The full-bleed background is a high-contrast black-and-white close-up of a hand locked in steel handcuffs with an open palm. A dark overlay covers the left column and top band. The headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' is in bold pale-cyan serif capitals, with white subhead '1/22/2025 | Denver, CO'. The name 'Arturo Alejandro Silvestre-Mendiola' is in large bold white sans-serif, followed by 'CRIMES:' and two bullets: 'Felony drug possession' and 'Intent to distribute a controlled substance'. The white DHS seal and 'ICE' wordmark are in the lower-left; a diagonal red banner in the lower-right reads 'DENVER FIELD OFFICE'. The accompanying tweet thanks the Denver Police Department for assistance.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/22/2025 | Denver, CO; Arturo Alejandro Silvestre-Mendiola; CRIMES: Felony drug possession, Intent to distribute a controlled substance; ICE; DENVER FIELD OFFICE
